mapper.sql: oi.id, oi.order_no as orderNo, oi.appointment_id as appointmentId, oi.customer_id as customerId, c.name as customerName, oi.service_item_id as serviceItemId, si.name as serviceItemName, oi.card_type as cardType, oi.original_amount as originalAmount, oi.discount_amount as discountAmount, oi.amount, oi.paid_amount as paidAmount, oi.debt_amount as debtAmount, oi.monthly_payment as monthlyPayment, oi.payment_method as paymentMethod, oi.debt_status as debtStatus, oi.pay_status as payStatus, oi.order_status as orderStatus, oi.pay_time as payTime, oi.create_time as createTime
mapper.select:
select
from order_info oi left join customer c on oi.customer_id = c.id left join service_item si on oi.service_item_id = si.id where oi.id = #{id} and oi.deleted = 0
